ago: adjective. Gone; gone by; gone away; passed; passed away.

lota: noun. A spherical pot, specifically a water pot used for washing and ablution, typically made of brass.

tolu: noun. The resinous secretion of Myroxylon balsamum, used in cough syrups and perfumery.

ugh: interjection. Used to express repugnance, disgust, or annoyance.
